geography.data_source: Census 2011 ward boundary shapefiles, South Delhi district + South East Delhi district combined. Covers Saket, Malviya Nagar, Hauz Khas, Greater Kailash, Lajpat Nagar, Mehrauli, Chattarpur.

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 South Delhi and South East Delhi district tables combined. Density = 1550000 / 250 = 6200. Lower density due to large area including green belt (Ridge), farmhouse areas, and institutional campuses (JNU, IIT Delhi).

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round MPCE distribution (South Delhi). Right-skewed: affluent colonies (GK, Defence Colony, Vasant Vihar) pull distribution upward. IIT Delhi, JNU campuses create educated workforce concentration.

commute_profile.data_source: DMRC Origin-Destination Survey 2022, Census 2011 Table D-13. Higher car ownership (0.52) reflects affluent demographics. Magenta Line added connectivity to airport corridor. Yellow Line serves the Hauz Khas-Saket-Qutab corridor.

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Composite scores. Low fare sensitivity (0.32) due to high income and car ownership. Moderate exam sensitivity (0.62) — many professional parents with children in competitive exam pipeline. High diffusion (0.78) reflecting digitally connected, educated population. Lokniti-CSDS 2024, ECI 2024 South Delhi constituency data.

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IHDS-II social capital module. Lower clustering (0.45) reflects dispersed, car-oriented suburban structure. Higher cross-income bridging (0.30) due to mixed-class neighbourhoods (GK market workers + GK residents).

informal_economy_nodes.name: Saket Select Citywalk / District Centre
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from DDA district centre data and mall footfall reports. Major retail and entertainment hub — Select Citywalk + DLF Place + Metropolitan Mall cluster.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Lajpat Nagar Central Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Major textile and wedding shopping market, high weekend footfall.

informal_economy_nodes.name: INA Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Specialty food and grocery market near INA metro station.

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: AGENT_SPEC.md High Income / Professional template (lines 742-752). Sum = 1.00. Tech/knowledge workers (0.38) reflect the South Delhi professional class — consulting, media, IT, and corporate workforce. Higher retired share (0.06) due to established colonies with aging demographics.

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from RWA federation data (South Delhi has some of the most active RWAs in India — GK, Defence Colony, Vasant Vihar), MCD councillor count, and JNU/IIT Delhi faculty directories.
